cases.name: baseline-haiku
cases.promptAppend: Play a balanced Comedy of the Commons game. Trade when it improves your medium-term position, but avoid obvious self-sabotage.

cases.name: commons-steward
cases.promptAppend: Prioritize long-term commons stewardship, reciprocal trade, and preserving productive ecosystems even if it lowers short-term extraction gains.

cases.name: hard-bargainer
cases.promptAppend: Prioritize leverage, opportunistic trades, and territorial growth. Cooperate only when it clearly improves your expected payout.
